perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a hand holding a fan of five differently colored smartphones, identified as the iPhone 17 series, in a brightly lit indoor space. (2) The scene cuts to a series of close-ups where a single hand rotates different colored phones to show their backs: Sage Green, Black, Fog Blue, Lavender, and White. (3) The focus shifts to the iPhone 17 Pro series, showcasing a larger triple-lens camera module in Dark Blue, Cosmic Orange, and Titanium Silver. (4) Finally, the 'iPhone Air' models are presented, featuring a unique horizontal dual-lens camera bar, shown in Sky Blue, Light Gold, Space Black, and Cloud White.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A continuous track of upbeat, rhythmic electronic pop music plays from the start. (2) High-pitched 'sparkle' or 'bling' sound effects are synchronized with the transition of each new phone model or color appearing on screen. (3) No human vocals, speech, or ambient environment noises are audible; the soundtrack is entirely studio-produced music and SFX.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'iPhone 17 全顏色實機' (iPhone 17 All Colors Real Device) - Informative hook. (2) 'iPhone 17 鼠尾草綠色' (Sage Green), '黑色' (Black), '霧藍色' (Fog Blue), '薰衣草紫色' (Lavender), '白色' (White) - Functional labels. (3) 'iPhone 17 Pro 系列 全顏色實機' (iPhone 17 Pro Series All Colors) - Section header. (4) '藏藍色', '宇宙橙色', '銀色' - Functional labels with lighting notes like '(室內光線偏黃)' (Indoor light yellowish). (5) 'iPhone Air 全顏色實機' - Section header. (6) '天藍色', '淺金色', '太空黑色', '雲白色' - Functional labels.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Fan Shot -> Sequential Model-by-Model Color Reveal -> Series Transitions

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 set of male hands holding and rotating the devices.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the creator are visible, wearing a watch on the left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern retail or showroom environment with blurred display tables and overhead lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive visual catalog of all potential colors and design variations for the iPhone 17 series (Standard, Pro, and the new Air model). The video serves as a quick-reference guide for tech enthusiasts interested in the aesthetic options of the upcoming device lineup.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Username '3ctim' and Facebook/Instagram logos in the upper left corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency cuts and 'bling' sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a purely visual list of products.
